pluginDescription: Filter candidate stations by callsign prefixes or exact matches.
filterOverviewDesc: Keep only candidates that match the configured prefix list. Useful for regional targeting or temporary allowlists.
allowedPrefixesDesc: Leave empty to disable filtering. Examples: JA, BG5, or a full callsign.
matchModeDesc: Prefix mode matches the beginning of a callsign. Exact mode requires a full exact match.
